title: Fix BLKANDNBLK for VARXREFs
body:
Without this change the new test gives me the confusing message of:
```
%Error-BLKANDNBLK: t/t_array_non_blocking_loop.v:11:34: Unsupported: Blocked and non-blocking assignments to same variable: 'writedata'                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
                                                      : ... note: In instance 't.gen_n[2].the_intf'      
   11 |     logic [write_data_width-1:0] writedata;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
      |                                  ^~~~~~~~~                                                                                                                                                                  
                   t/t_array_non_blocking_loop.v:27:43: ... Location of blocking assignment                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
   27 |                         the_intf.writedata[i] <= '1;                                                                                                                                                        
      |                                           ^                                                                                                                                                                 
                   t/t_array_non_blocking_loop.v:27:43: ... Location of nonblocking assignment                                                                                                                      
   27 |                         the_intf.writedata[i] <= '1;                                                                                                                                                        
      |                                           ^                    
```

The problem (if I understand correctly) is that `replaceBoundLvalue()` was only chasing `VARREF`s through `SEL`s but was not handling `VARXREF`s.

   11 |     logic [write_data_width-1:0] writedata;                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
      |                                  ^~~~~~~~~                                                                                                                                                                  
                   t/t_array_non_blocking_loop.v:27:43: ... Location of blocking assignment                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
   27 |                         the_intf.writedata[i] <= '1;                                                                                                                                                        
      |                                           ^                                                                                                                                                                 
                   t/t_array_non_blocking_loop.v:27:43: ... Location of nonblocking assignment                                                                                                                      
   27 |                         the_intf.writedata[i] <= '1;                                                                                                                                                        
      |                                           ^
